## 📋 Summary

<!-- Clearly describe what this PR changes and why. Link to a related issue if applicable. -->
<!-- Example: Closes #42 | Fixes #17 -->

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that could break existing behavior)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility improvement
- [ ] 🎨 Style / visual fix (no logic change)

## ✅ Validation

Before requesting a review, confirm you have run all checks locally:

- [ ] `npm run lint` — TypeScript type-check passes with **zero errors**
- [ ] `npm run build` — Vite production build succeeds
- [ ] Manually verified all **affected routes** in a browser (list them below)

**Routes manually tested:**
<!-- e.g. /, /journal, /journal/view/:id, /live, /dashboard -->

## 📝 Implementation Notes

<!-- Any important decisions, trade-offs, or things the reviewer should pay attention to -->

## ☑️ Final Checklist

- [ ] My change is **focused** — it addresses one concern only
- [ ] My branch is **up to date** with the base branch
- [ ] I have **not** hardcoded any secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] I have **not** removed or weakened any existing tests or validations
- [ ] The **Dark-Amber visual design** is preserved for all touched pages
- [ ] Mobile layout is **unaffected** by desktop-only changes (or verified separately)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if my change affects a documented behavior
